The verifier actually ran the binary (curl /api/health, /, /dashboard, /assets/*.js all 200 OK), confirmed 28 placeholder tests, 14+14 package layout, go.mod tidied to a single direct dep (fasthttp), and embed.go → ui/dist wiring works. Ready for Phase 2.
